title: Fast and Better Vanilla
description:
A vanilla-focused Minecraft modpack that improves performance, usability and clarity without changing core gameplay.
Includes optimization mods, essential APIs and carefully selected QoL features.
body:
# Fast & Better Vanilla

## Overview

**Fast & Better Vanilla** is a **lightweight client-side modpack** designed to enhance the raw Vanilla Minecraft experience. It focuses on **performance optimization**, **improved usability**, **UI clarity**, and **practical in-game tweaks**. This pack aims to make Vanilla Minecraft **faster, cleaner, and more enjoyable**, without altering core gameplay mechanics or server interactions.

Unlike feature-heavy modpacks or aggressive optimization packs, Fast & Better Vanilla takes a **balanced approach**: every included mod is carefully selected to improve the Vanilla experience, from performance enhancements and chat tools to optional visual improvements and quality-of-life tweaks.

---

## Important Notice

**This modpack is intended for private use only.**

Use on public servers may result in bans. The modpack creator assumes **no responsibility** for damages, data loss, or issues caused by usage. Use at your own risk.

---

![In-Game view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b5d5cf066c9f5611ac7134b7ebc77af06254b69.png)

## Design Goals

* Enhance overall performance and game responsiveness
* Improve user interface (UI) and chat readability
* Provide practical in-game enhancements, e.g., zoom, durability tools, chat animations
* Include optional visual enhancements such as shaders and item/tooltip improvements
* Preserve Vanilla gameplay without interfering with server rules or game balance

> The goal is to make Vanilla Minecraft **better, smoother, and more refined** while retaining its authentic feel.

---

## What This Modpack Provides

* Performance optimizations for smoother gameplay across all systems
* UI and HUD improvements, including clear and organized chat messages
* Useful in-game tweaks such as Zoomify, DurabilityTooltip, and Chat Animations
* Optional visual improvements including shader support
* Better item and block information via Roughly Enough Items (REI) and Jade
* World management enhancements and stability improvements

All features are **subtle**, **non-intrusive**, and **Vanilla-friendly**, providing an enhanced gameplay experience without compromising the original feel.

---

## Included Mod Topics

* Performance & Rendering Optimizations (Lithium, Sodium, FerriteCore)
* UI & Chat Enhancements (ChatTools, ChatAnimations, ChatPatches)
* Item & Block Information (Roughly Enough Items, Jade)
* World Management & Safety (Cherished Worlds, Distant Horizons)
* Gameplay Tweaks (Zoomify, DurabilityTooltip, DefaultOptions, Tweakeroo)
* Shader & Visual Enhancements (Iris, Blur)
* Optional Libraries & APIs (Fabric API, Architectury, MaLiLib)

---

## Summary

**Fast & Better Vanilla** is a **lightweight, performance-focused modpack** that enhances Vanilla Minecraft without intrusive features or server-side risks. It is ideal for players seeking a **refined and smoother Vanilla experience** in private worlds and singleplayer.
